description: You are a Systems Engineer at SmartGrow. Create a standardized custom component library named 'SmartGrow Devices' for the company's IoT hardware and use it to create a deployment diagram. Using the visual requirements in '~/Desktop/device_specs.txt', create two grouped custom symbols: 'SoilProbe-X1' (green vertical rectangle body with a brown triangle tip) and 'Hub-Gateway-Z' (blue square body with a white circle antenna and red status LED). Save the library to '~/Diagrams/SmartGrow_Lib.xml'. Create a deployment diagram named 'field_deployment.drawio' in '~/Diagrams/' featuring one Hub connected to three Soil Probes with arrows, using the symbols from your new library. All composite symbols must be properly grouped.
